title: Apple Loses Another Top Executive to OpenAI
abstract: Apple Loses Another Top Executive to OpenAI may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform general platform...
abstract_zh: 苹果又双叒叕损失大牛去了OpenAI，这波操作真·防不胜防！不过话说回来，在AI这片快到没朋友的江湖里，专精的小工具就是王道。毕竟，术业有专攻嘛！
